basics.name: Bhavya Dalwadi
basics.headline: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience building large-scale web platforms, enterprise identity systems, and complex product interfaces. Increasingly focused on AI-enabled workflows, structured evaluation, and practical tools built with systems judgment across the full stack.
basics.email: Use the contact page for the fastest response

strengths: Owns product behavior end to end, from interaction design to backend workflows
Comfortable operating across frontend platforms, identity systems, and application architecture
Prefers clear scope, honest tradeoffs, and systems that stay understandable under change
Comfortable shaping AI into a product capability rather than a surface-level feature

selectedWins.title: Authentication and session platform
selectedWins.summary: Improved authentication success rate by 18% and user adoption by 17% through redesigned login, session, and WebView sharing flows across Safeway brands.

selectedWins.title: React platform migration
selectedWins.summary: Helped lead migration from legacy AEM architecture to a React micro-frontend platform with shared frontend libraries and stronger platform consistency.

selectedWins.title: AI-enabled product work
selectedWins.summary: Integrated Google Vertex AI, prompt engineering, and structured evaluation into real application workflows while continuing hands-on work with Ollama, LM Studio, and spec-driven development.

experience.title: Sr. Software Engineer
highlights: Increased authentication success rate by 18% by redesigning login and session flows across Safeway brands.
Improved user adoption by 17% through WebView session sharing across web and mobile.
Led migration from legacy AEM architecture to a React micro-frontend platform.
Integrated AI capabilities using Google Vertex AI to support application intelligence and automation workflows.
Applied prompt engineering and structured evaluation techniques to production-oriented AI integrations.
Delivered frontend platform components supporting authentication, session management, and enterprise user workflows.
Architected and shipped NestJS services for secure session management, SSO, userInfo, and logout orchestration.
Defined frontend architecture patterns, component standards, and performance best practices.
Enhanced web accessibility and ADA compliance.
Contributed to migration from Teamsite-LiveSite to AEM.
Led development of a permission-based user login system.
Redesigned a more secure and user-friendly password reset application.

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Used React.js to design interactive cross-browser user interfaces.
Optimized web performance using Grunt and Gulp.
Implemented responsive designs with Bootstrap and Foundation.

leadershipSignals: Platform ownership in identity and personalization space
Cross-functional collaboration with product owners and UX

education.institution: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology

fit.title: Best fit
fit.body: I am most interested in Staff or Lead roles where frontend platform thinking, system design, product judgment, and AI-enabled workflows all matter. The strongest fit is work that values clarity, trust, and operational quality as core engineering concerns.
